"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\Clion\CLion 2024.3.5\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\TIM_Grafica.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\TIM_Grafica.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\TIM_Grafica.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\TIM_Grafica.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o TIM_Grafica.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTIM_Grafica.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\TIM_Grafica.dir\linkLibs.rsp
